title: Projects & Case Studies
text:
Role: Co-Founder & Growth Lead



Moonbow Website Interface



The Challenge: Building a devshop that integrates high-performance engineering with strategic marketing.
The Solution: Developed automated social media technology and sales funnel engineering.
Impact: Precision-targeted Google and Meta Ads generating measurable ROI.




Role: Digital Marketing Associate



Total Space Brand Identity



The Challenge: Unifying B2B identity and migrating the brand without losing user engagement.
The Solution: Implemented HubSpot workflows and AI-driven chatbots to optimize the sales funnel.
Impact: Created a seamless user journey across digital platforms.




Role: Lead Designer / Developer



Ubiquitous Migration Project



The Challenge: Migrating a legacy site from WordPress to Astro to improve performance and SEO.
The Solution: Rebuilt the site architecture using modern web standards for faster loading times and better UX.
Impact: Significant reduction in bounce rate and improved technical SEO rankings.

title: Diana Alejandra Pachon
text:
Experience Highlights
Digital Marketing Associate (Practicum) | Total Space Inc., BC (Jan 2026 – Present)

UX & Brand Evolution: Leading brand migration and B2B identity unification.
MarTech Optimization: Implementing HubSpot workflows and AI-driven chatbots.
Performance Marketing: Managing Google/Meta Ads with a “video-first” SEO strategy.

Production Artist | Pure Red (Remote, USA) (Feb 2023 – July 2024)

Design Execution: Developed digital and print assets for Tier-1 retail clients like Lowe’s.
Workflow Optimization: Collaborated with cross-functional teams to streamline creative production.

Content Creator & Marketing Analyst | Sensa Labs (Remote, Canada) (Sept 2022 – July 2023)

UX-Driven Redesign: Led a corporate website redesign to enhance navigation flow.
Growth Strategy: Increased returning user engagement by 5% in three months.

title: Leadership & Community
text:

Strategic Growth: Leading the digital growth division, specializing in Google and Meta Ads with engineering precision to generate qualified leads and measurable ROI.
UX & Brand Strategy: Overseeing the visual identity and user journey for our “Digital Engineering Devshop,” ensuring scalable and conversion-optimized interfaces.
Innovative Solutions: Developing automated social media tech and sales funnel engineering to help startups eliminate repetitive work.




MBA Candidate | University Canada West (Current)

Cross-Functional Collaboration: Facilitating group dynamics and strategic alignment in MBA case studies, focusing on international business expansion and operational scaling.
Knowledge Sharing: Actively participating in peer-to-peer mentorship regarding UX best practices and the integration of AI tools in marketing workflows.
Project Management: Coordinating timelines and deliverables for high-stakes academic projects.

title: Diana Alejandra Pachon
text:
¡Hola! I am a marketing professional and designer with a deep focus on User Experience (UX). I believe the most effective marketing strategies are built on intuitive, user-centered design. With a dual background in Advertising and Graphic Design, and currently completing my MBA, I bridge the gap between creative intuition and business growth.
Currently, I am co-founding Moonbow, where we engineer extraordinary digital solutions by blending high-performance tech with strategic marketing. My passion lies in crafting seamless user journeys that not only captivate but also convert, driving measurable results for startups and established brands alike. I am excited to connect with like-minded professionals and explore opportunities to innovate in the digital marketing space.
